hooks.command: COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null) && CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r HEAD 2>/dev/null) && if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | head -1 | grep -qE '^Merge '; then exit 0; fi && MEANINGFUL=$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -vE '(node_modules/|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml|\.claude/plans/)' || true) && if [ -z "$MEANINGFUL" ]; then exit 0; fi && if echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -qE '^CHANGELOG\.md$'; then exit 0; fi && FIRST_LINE=$(echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | head -1) && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"A commit was just made without updating CHANGELOG.md. Commit: %s. Files changed: %s. Please suggest a Keep a Changelog entry for the [Unreleased] section and ask the user if they want to add it."}}' "$FIRST_LINE" "$(echo $MEANINGFUL | tr '\n' ', ')"
